productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Solid White Shirts
description: CompositionWhite cargo shirt made of 100% cotton, has a collar with a tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves with panel detailing beneath the cuffs and buttoned flaps, buttoned placket on the front, two patch pockets on the front with buttoned flaps and stitch detailing, brand name and lettering embroidered on the left pocket, brand name embroidered on the right side, distressed look lettering on the left sleeve and curved hemlineFittingRegular Wash careMachine wash in cold waterWash with like coloursWash/dry inside outUse mild detergentsDo not tumble dryUse warm ironDo not iron on decorRemove all detatchable accessoriesGet your little brat ready for the going-out in this white cargo shirt from palm tree. The embroidered lettering on the side saying "Palm spring league" and rugby team inspired lettering on the pocket and sleeve adds to the sporty vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
